# ia-mercado-laboral Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-16

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 5.x with Astro 6.x (latest stable) + Astro 6, Tailwind CSS 4, Google Fonts API (Manrope + Inter) (001-create-base-layout)
- Static JSON files within project (no database needed) (001-create-base-layout)
- TypeScript/JavaScript sobre Astro 6 + Astro 6, Tailwind CSS 4 via `@tailwindcss/vite`, HTMX 2+ (001-create-base-layout)
- Archivos JSON internos en `src/data/` (sin base de datos) (001-create-base-layout)
- TypeScript/JavaScript on Astro 6 + Astro 6, Tailwind CSS 4 (`@theme`), ApexCharts v4+, HTMX 2+, Bun (003-add-ui-base-components)
- Internal JSON files (`src/data/charts-config.json`) (003-add-ui-base-components)
- TypeScript/JavaScript on Astro 6 + Astro 6, Tailwind CSS 4 with `@theme`, HTMX 2+, Bun, existing reusable UI/chart components (004-run-git-feature)
- Internal JSON files (`src/data/randstad-catalunya.json`, `src/data/idescat-provincias.json`, `src/data/charts-config.json`) (004-run-git-feature)
- TypeScript/JavaScript sobre Astro 6 + Astro 6, Tailwind CSS 4 con `@theme`, HTMX 2+, ApexCharts (componentes ya existentes), Bun (005-crear-landing-ia-mercado)
- Archivos JSON internos (`src/data/randstad-catalunya.json`, `src/data/idescat-provincias.json`, `src/data/charts-config.json`) (005-crear-landing-ia-mercado)
- TypeScript/JavaScript sobre Astro 6 (latest stable) + Astro 6, Tailwind CSS 4 con `@theme`, Bun, componentes UI existentes, ApexCharts existente (006-prepare-specify-branch)
- Archivos JSON internos (`src/data/fuentes.json`) (006-prepare-specify-branch)

- TypeScript/JavaScript - Astro 6 (latest stable) + Astro 6, Tailwind CSS 4, ApexCharts, HTMX 2+, Bun (package manager) (main)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript/JavaScript - Astro 6 (latest stable): Follow standard conventions
